creator: kalten@gmx.at
text:
(In reply to Kalten from comment #1)
Well: Setting
---8<---
sysctl compat.linux.osrelease="2.6.18"
--->8---
(or using /etc/sysctl.conf for it) resolves the problem:
emulators/linux_base-c6 needs it: see
---8<---
pkg info -Dx linux_base-c6
--->8---
(it displays the file emulators/linux_base-c6/pkg-message)

ru,
 Kalten
